message:
fix(trace): fix integrity tests and add module exports [bd-gq2p]

- Remove unused imports (TraceFileError, TraceReader) from integrity.rs
- Fix detect_invalid_magic test to use enough bytes to pass size check
- Add integrity module exports to trace/mod.rs for public API access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
